title: Incredible VR
body:
# Incredible VR
A **light VR** Minecraft modpack

## Performance
I tried to make the modpack as light as possible so it won't lag and so you can enjoy the modpack while in VR

## Structures
Here a few mods that tweak the game's structures and adds some:
- Immersive Structure
- Towns and towers
- When dungeon arise
And more...

(A few more mods)
- Vivecraft
- Immersive mc
- Terralith

## Disclaimer
There will be no backporting of this modpack.\
For any inquiries, contact me on Discord: **patategivree**
This is my very first modpack so please don't be to arsh ^^'
